title: Cirrus: Obsolete CI:IMG process & related files
body:
All VM-building functionality has been migrated to
https://github.com/containers/automation_images

Some container-build functions are still maintained here
but are on a very-short list to also be migrated to
the repository linked above.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: @edsantiago @rhatdan @baude @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL, this is ready to go in.

LGTM
but definitely want @edsantiago to give this a thorough review.
Fixed both concerns, rebased, force pushed.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Could you remove it, to prevent future maintainer confusion?

Yes, that whole block except one line can be removed...
Should you also remove the rest of the files in `contrib/cirrus/packer`, and all mentions of `$PACKER` in `contrib/cirrus/lib.sh`, and mention of `systemd_banish.sh`?

> remove the rest of the files in contrib/cirrus/packer, and all mentions

Oh! I thought I got that...fixing...
Thank you for your patience with my nitpicking. This is good cleanup, I can find no other loose ends. LGTM!
